arts.ttl: Noussair Mazraoui agrees with something every Manchester United fan has been saying
arts.sum: Noussair Mazraoui reflected on Man Utd's 3-2 victory against Norwegian side Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim claims Manchester United improved four things vs Bodo/Glimt
arts.sum: After a 1-1 draw with Ipswich Town, Man United beat Bodo/Glimt 3-2 at Old Trafford in the Europa League on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund shows true Man United colours with five-word Ruben Amorim message
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund doubled his tally for the season on Thursday night as Ruben Amorim's side secured three points in the Europa League

arts.ttl: The staggering £86m Manchester United sum that INEOS wants to avoid
arts.sum: Manchester United have spent huge sums in disposing of managerial, coaching staff, and club executive contracts

arts.ttl: Francis Ngannou poses with Andre Onana as heavyweight star takes a trip to Old Trafford to watch Man United in Ruben Amorim's first home game
arts.sum: The players on the pitch weren't the only stars in attendance, with Ngannou taking a break out of the fight game to go and watch the team and catch up with friend and countryman Onana.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim delivers touching message to 'special' Man United supporters after securing his first victory as manager
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AT OLD TRAFFORD: Ruben Amorim toasted a 'special' night at Old Trafford where he felt he was officially taken in as one of Manchester United's own.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim earns Michael Owen's seal of approval with 3-2 win over Bodo/Glimt - as former Man United star pinpoints what marks him out from Sir Alex Ferguson's other successors
arts.sum: The former Red Devil believes there is one key quality to Amorim's side that marks him out from the other five men who have tried, and failed, to live up to Sir Alex Ferguson's legacy.

arts.ttl: Amorim admits anxiety despite first Man Utd win
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says Manchester United are causing him to be "anxious" and "nervous" while the players get to grips with his tactical demands.

arts.ttl: Amorim enjoys 'special' first Man Utd win despite 'anxiety'
arts.sum: New Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim describes his Old Trafford welcome as "special" but admits he is "anxious" going into games.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Højlund's performances could define Ruben Amorim's stint at Man United
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim earned his first win as Manchester United boss, which came thanks to a great performance from forward Rasmus Højlund.
